system.notes: Works identically to the cybernetic echolocation processor system (Chromebook 4 p.68, processor on p.13): emitters and microphones build a 3-D sonic image — see in pitch-blackness regardless of the EM spectrum. Printed caveats: −1 Awareness for visual detail while in use (−2 for colors/textures), and a white-noise generator jams it. The book prints no range; 20 m is the engine's standard device default.
